signals.headline: ETH Nears Two-Month High on U
signals.raw:
ETH Nears Two-Month High on U.S.-Iran Peace Optimism | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin rose 5% to ~$75,000 and Ethereum jumped 7% to nearly $2,400 early Tuesday (April 14, 2026), driven by market bets on progressing U.S.-Iran peace talks reducing geopolitical risks.[2]  
This recent price surge aligns with Polymarket odds showing 59% probability for ETH at $2,300–$2,400 on April 23, 2026, potent
